name: Iso11783OPChangeListItem
title: Iso11783OPChangeListItem
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeListItem( dword ecuHandle, dword inputID, dword index, dword itemID );
description: The function changes an item in an input list object. A Change List Item command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
